name: agent-order
description: The Order of the Agents — AI peer review for decisions that matter. Codex, Claude, and other agents deliberate, critique, and issue a decree.
author: Bilal Tahir

scripts.check: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-order.js --help && node dist/bin/agent-order.js check --config examples/mock.config.yaml
scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-order.js "Plan a saved-search feature for a project management app. Include UX, data model, API, rollout risks, and acceptance criteria." --config examples/mock.config.yaml --out .tmp/demo-runs --max-turns 9
scripts.smoke:real: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-order.js "Plan a saved-search feature for a project management app. Include UX, data model, API, rollout risks, and acceptance criteria." --agents codex,claude --out .tmp/real-runs --max-turns 3 --human-input never --no-final-review
